page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Edition - Air chapter
text:
is an artbook of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Edition - Air film. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 28 October 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048528815
